name: HRManagement
description: Sector Products > HR Management. A folder of full HR app screens and page-specific components assembled from Product Components (HR widgets are reused from Product Components, not duplicated). Contains: HRManagementDashboard (SidebarNavigation + PageHeader + HR widgets), NavigationOnboarding (onboarding top bar with step indicator), and Calendar Page Components.
sourceNote: HR Management is an organizational folder under Sector Products, not a single component. Calendar Page Components ported from Figma nodes 3878:61401 (Calendar), 3877:58564 (Calendar Card), 3877:58545 (Card Positioning), 3875:40906 (Calendar Upcoming), 3873:40841 (Upcoming Status). NavigationOnboarding from 3903:28827. The Calendar renders a weekly time-grid by absolutely positioning CalendarCards by day + start/end hour; the disabled day column uses a hatched repeating-linear-gradient. The 75%/liquid and image-heavy Figma assets are approximated with tokenized SVG/CSS.
